mushi.notes: Hosted Streamable HTTP MCP — recommended for Cursor plugin usage. Replace the URL with your Supabase project's edge function URL. Set MUSHI_API_KEY in your shell environment or Cursor settings.
mushi._envSetup: Export MUSHI_API_KEY=<your-mcp-read-key> in your shell profile, or add it to Cursor → Settings → Environment Variables.

mushi-stdio.notes: stdio fallback — runs npx @mushi-mushi/mcp locally. Use this if the hosted HTTP endpoint is not configured.
